productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Women Spring Fragrance Gift Set
description: It's not just about looking good, but smelling good too. And that's something ed hardy believes in completely. With the celebration season here, look no further for gifts. This women's Spring Gift Set from Ed Hardy makes for a perfect medium to express your love for that beautiful woman in your life.Add that bling to your look with the Shimmering Body Lotion that comes in a 90 ml and a flowery fragranceEu De Perfume spray in two bottles of 7.5 ml and 100 ml with a flowery fragranceLuggage tage with an original ed hardy tattoo design by the legendary tattoo artist Christian AudigierBathe in flowery fragrant luxury with the bath and shower gel that comes in a 90 ml tube
